university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: If you enjoy mathematics and believe it is an important tool for solving problems, both in business and scientific research, this is the degree for you. Our degree programme will provide you with training that will enable you to develop analytical skills to structure problems and formulate solutions using a variety of theoretical and computational tools.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Microorganisms are the central actors of life on planet Earth, endowed with unparalleled adaptability and transformative power. No ecological process occurs without the direct or indirect intervention of microorganisms. Global awareness of the importance of microorganisms as agents of health and disease and as catalysts for processes and products reinforces the importance of advanced training in Microbiology. This importance will be amplified in the near future, considering the goals of sustainable development and the paradigms for the coming decades in the areas of planetary health, biodiversity, sustainability, and resource circularity. Microbiology is therefore currently one of the fastest-growing scientific and technological fields, covering several high-growth/high-value segments of the international market.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: In today's world, where data is generated in large quantities, Statistics is indispensable, contributing to informed decision-making that has an impact on people's lives. The Bachelor's Degree in Applied Statistics, which focuses on data collection/production, analysis and interpretation, aims to train professionals for the job market, which has seen an increasing demand for specialists with statistical reasoning skills and the ability to use computational tools.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Biochemistry studies the molecules and chemical processes that occur in living organisms. It explores the structure and function of different biological molecules, such as proteins, carbohydrates, lipids, and nucleic acids, and the ways in which they interact with each other to sustain life. It is a stimulating and dynamic area at the frontier of science, which encompasses multidisciplinary knowledge from subatomic particles to cells, with a strong mathematical and computational component and some incursion into human physiology and pathology.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Demonstrate the ability to design, implement and develop an independent line of research (preferably recognised by the ability to publish in international peer-reviewed journals);

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Biochemistry and Biomedicine provides advanced training in biochemistry topics that impact the understanding of molecular, biochemical, and cellular processes relevant to cutting-edge problems in biology and biomedicine. This training is essential to properly respond to the societal challenges faced by the life sciences in the areas of health and technology.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: This training will be multidisciplinary, seeking to provide students with advanced and specialised knowledge applicable to cutting-edge scientific research and areas of growing employability for highly qualified human resources with differentiated training, such as the Pharmaceutical, Health and Biotechnology sectors.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Biology is one of the most diverse and exciting areas of study in science today. At Ciências, students attend a two-year core curriculum, where they acquire a solid and cross-disciplinary education. In the 3rd year, they choose one of four branches. They have access to advanced studies in Biology, participate in research projects, combining learning in the laboratory and in the field. The diverse faculty's mission is to train critical biologists, ready to face the challenges that our planet and humanity face.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in Biology covers virtually all scientific areas of Biology and aims to train professionals with a solid scientific attitude and full mastery of study methodologies in their area of specialisation.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
field_of_study: Engenharias e técnicas afins - programas não classificados noutra área de formação
full_description_text: Some of the most fascinating scientific problems of our time and the most important technological challenges for health lie at the frontier between engineering, physics, and medicine. It is an area with excellent opportunities, which will certainly continue to contribute decisively to the enormous revolution that modern medicine is undergoing. At Ciências, the Bachelor's Degree in Biomedical Engineering and Biophysics benefits from its strong connection to IBEB, the only research center in Portugal dedicated exclusively to Biomedical Engineering and Biophysics.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Biomedical Engineering and Biophysics (MEBB) aims to train professionals in the complex and rapidly evolving multidisciplinary scientific and technological field of Biomedical Engineering.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: This Doctorate programme in Biomedical Engineering and Biophysics aims to provide advanced training in research in different areas of Biomedical Engineering, focusing, on the one hand, on physical methods of studying the human organism, in terms of biophysical modelling of physiological processes, and, on the other hand, the powerful physical means of diagnosis and therapy that have revolutionised medicine in recent decades and are present in hospitals.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master’s Degree in Biostatistics offers solid training in probability and statistics, integrating data science and artificial intelligence. Focusing on life sciences and public health, it trains students to analyze complex data and respond to real societal challenges, contributing to advances in biomedical research and health decision-making.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: In a subtle and almost invisible way, chemistry is omnipresent. It is essential for meeting basic needs such as food, clothing and shelter, and for obtaining clean air, water and soil. Chemical technology provides solutions for health, materials development, new forms of energy and much more.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Chemistry aims to provide students with advanced training in emerging areas of chemistry, supported by a solid theoretical and experimental component in various basic fields, and to develop decision-making, strategic thinking and organisational skills.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The main objective of the Doctorate in Chemistry is to produce knowledge through original research in Chemistry, from a fundamental or applied perspective. The total workload of the degree should correspond to approximately four years of full-time study.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Sustainable development depends on good management of living resources, which is only possible with the support of well-trained technicians and scientists. This Master's programme aims to prepare professionals with a solid background in Conservation Biology and Ecology.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The importance of Data Science is confirmed by the growing prominence of professionals in large companies and institutions, both internationally and nationally, with skills in data science, including data analysis, data processing, and data mining, among others. Internationally, several companies and institutions employ Chief Data Officers (CDOs), including large banking institutions, government departments, web companies, among other examples. Data science represents a ubiquitous area of knowledge in today's information society, and its importance and prominence are expected to continue to grow in the coming years.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Ecology and Environmental Management aims to prepare qualified human resources, equipped with the interdisciplinary skills essential to understand and manage ecosystems in order to maintain balance and ensure environmentally sustainable development.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Bachelor's Degree in Energy and Environment Engineering provides comprehensive training in the design of sustainable energy systems. Students acquire transdisciplinary skills in renewable energy, energy efficiency and environmental impact mitigation. They understand the underlying scientific principles and develop skills to solve engineering problems, considering economic, ethical and public health aspects.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The challenge of energy transition requires transdisciplinary skills that traditional engineering master's degrees do not offer. The main objective of this cycle of studies is the specialised training of engineering professionals in design, assessment, energy management, renewable resources, sustainable buildings and mobility, and mitigation of environmental impacts associated with energy use, namely greenhouse gas emissions and emissions associated with air quality.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Engineering Physics integrates knowledge of Physics, Mathematics, Electronics and Instrumentation, Materials and Programming to create innovative solutions for science and industry.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Training based on the professional experience and solid scientific knowledge of the teaching staff, promoting multidisciplinary learning

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: This Master's Degree aims to train geology professionals who are able to adapt their work to developments in knowledge, technology and the needs of society. The curriculum includes coherent and flexible teaching and learning pathways that combine the following in a balanced way

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in Geology aims to develop skills compatible with the internationally recommended qualification descriptors for the 3rd Cycle of Higher Education in Europe.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Geophysical Sciences aims to train professionals in the fields of Meteorology, Oceanography and Geophysics, with the ability to intervene in Earth monitoring systems, climate, ocean and geological process modelling, natural risk assessment and extreme geophysical phenomena, and the quantification of renewable energy, water and hydrocarbon resources. The Master's Degree includes core components of Earth Physics, Observation Systems and Mathematical Modelling of the Atmosphere, Ocean and Globe.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in Geophysical Sciences and Geoinformation is designed for advanced training in Earth Sciences with a strong Physics and Mathematics component.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The challenges facing society today are characterised by enormous complexity. Natural disasters, food shortages, epidemics and climate change are problems that cannot be solved in a simple or definitive way. The world needs socially committed engineers who can contribute to building more sustainable and resilient societies. Combining scientific and technical knowledge makes geospatial engineers the most qualified professionals to handle geoinformation and design solutions for the territory based on multidisciplinary approaches that solve the planet's greatest challenges.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Geospatial Engineering aims to train professionals with scientific foundations and technological skills, capable of performing tasks related to the acquisition, analysis and management of geospatial information, particularly in terms of spatial referencing, visualisation, sharing and dissemination techniques, and cartographic representation.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree aims to provide a clear, broad and accurate understanding of the main themes, issues and methodological trends that have guided the development and evolution of the disciplines of History of Science and Philosophy of Science in an international context. At the same time, it aims to provide an understanding of the specific characteristics of Science and Technology in Portugal, both in historical terms and in terms of contemporary analysis, as well as an initial introduction to the field of conservation and musealisation of Portuguese scientific and technological heritage.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in History and Philosophy of Science provides continuity to the Master's Degree in History and Philosophy of Science, or to another equivalent degree offered in Portugal or abroad. The aim is to offer advanced training in the History of Science and/or Philosophy of Science, providing a high level of specialisation in a field of History and/or Philosophy of Science.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Human Biology and Environment aims to provide students with a sound understanding of how the environment, in its various aspects, affects human health and quality of life.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Informatics offers scientific and technological specialisation in the field of Informatics, based on a set of optional subjects and the completion of a project or dissertation. It has a simple and flexible curriculum structure, enabling individualised paths for deepening knowledge and acquiring fundamental and advanced skills in the various scientific areas of the Department of Informatics.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in Informatics is intended for students who demonstrate the ability to conduct research in computational science and/or informatics engineering.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: In a process of continuous improvement to bring the best and latest scientific and technical knowledge closer to the demands of the most qualified companies. Linked to the Master's Degree in Informatics Engineering, in a coherent five-year training programme necessary for the professional activity of a informatics engineer.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Informatics Engineering from Ciências ULisboa provides advanced knowledge in the field of Informatics Engineering. This cycle of studies promotes the development of specialised skills, meeting the highest quality standards and best practices adopted internationally.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Information Security is a programme that aims to continue the training of professionals in the field of information security, succeeding the previous programme that took place under the agreement between the Portuguese Government and Carnegie Mellon University.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The curriculum of the Bachelor's Degree aims to train professionals with a solid scientific and technological background in the fundamentals and main structural areas of Informatics. In addition, the degree promotes multidisciplinary training through a coherent group of subjects (minor) in a complementary area, such as Management, Statistics and Operational Research, Geographic Information Technologies, Multimedia Design, or Biology.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: To provide postgraduate training, both theoretical and practical, focused on the analysis of oceanic and coastal environments and the issues associated with them;

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The aim is to train professionals, scientists and technicians with a comprehensive profile, specific skills and a high degree of proficiency and autonomy, capable of integrating harmoniously into multidisciplinary teams. The 2nd Cycle in Marine Sciences also serves as a promotional vehicle for 3rd cycles in Marine Sciences, an area of Doctoral Studies in Ciências.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in Marine Sciences aims to train professionals with the ability to conduct original and independent research in an area of Marine Sciences, from an original or applied perspective, through the acquisition of skills and research methods in that area, while contributing to scientific progress in an academic or professional context.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Bachelor's Degree in Mathematics at Ciências ULisboa is aimed at students who enjoy mathematics. The curriculum includes more abstract topics, but also numerous applications of mathematics to other sciences. This degree is challenging and requires dedication, but it brings enormous satisfaction.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Mathematics has two complementary objectives. On one hand, it aims to provide students with a solid background in the fundamental areas of Pure Mathematics, namely Algebra, Mathematical Analysis and Geometry, equipping them with a panoramic view of the current mathematical landscape.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The study plan is drawn up individually for each doctoral student. The scientific diversity of the Department of Mathematical Sciences is reflected in the range of scientific areas offered.

program_name: Mathematics Applied to Economics and Business
university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Mathematics Applied to Economics and Business aims to provide advanced training in the areas of mathematics most relevant to economics and business management. It also aims to provide complementary training in Economics and, above all, in Management, so that its graduates obtain a solid background in Mathematics and, at the same time, are able to use it effectively in solving business management problems and other economic activities. Companies and other economic agents have shown great interest in staff with this type of training.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: This Degree aims to train a new generation of professionals in the fields of Meteorology, Oceanography and Geophysics, with the ability to intervene in Earth monitoring systems, climate, ocean and solid Earth modelling and forecasting, natural risk assessment and extreme geophysical phenomena, and the quantification of energy (including renewable), water and mineral resources. Throughout the degree, students develop integrated skills in the field, data analysis, physical and data-driven modelling, and learn to find pragmatic solutions to real challenges.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Molecular Biology and Genetics gives students specialised scientific knowledge, which is in high demand among employers in sectors that are rapidly developing in Europe and urgently need to be developed in our country.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: This Master's Degree (formerly known as ‘Evolutionary and Developmental Biology’) aims to provide an integrated view of biology from an organism-centred perspective, establishing an interconnection of concepts at various levels of biological organisation: molecular, cellular, organismal and population, from bacteria to humans.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: Physics studies Nature at all scales: from elementary particles to nuclei, atoms and molecules, to phases of matter, to planets, to galaxies, to the universe. It is a fascinating science, with intense research activity that has led to fundamental discoveries and the development of new technologies.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Physics and Astrophysics aims to provide advanced training in these areas and develop the ability to conduct scientific research. To teach advanced units on current topics and supervise dissertations on a wide range of subjects, it relies on lecturers and researchers from the Department of Physics with internationally recognised scientific research and extensive experience in postgraduate teaching.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in Physics and Astrophysics aims to prepare students to conduct original and independent research in a specific field of fundamental, applied or observational physics/astrophysics.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Master's Degree in Statistics and Operational Research aims to provide students with advanced training in the areas of Statistics and Operational Research, through the deepening of fundamental knowledge with application techniques, with a view to applying it to different situations and linking it to other scientific and technological areas.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: The Doctorate in Sustainable Energy Systems aims, through an interdisciplinary approach, to train a new generation of decision-makers who are aware of sustainability issues and have knowledge in the areas of energy systems and economics. The emphasis on energy systems design, research, leadership and entrepreneurship provides doctorates with the essential tools to be at the forefront of the development of sustainable energy systems.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Faculdade de Ciências
full_description_text: In Technological Chemistry, you will embark on a journey of discovery that explores chemistry and the materials, processes, and chemical products that drive modern society.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
field_of_study: Construção e reparação de veículos a motor
full_description_text: Aerospace Engineering has accelerated the way we travel by developing different types of vehicles such as airplanes, helicopters, or robotized aircraft and air traffic management. It also deals with the development of rockets and satellites, and contribute s to the improvement of forms of communication. The role of an aerospace engineer involves planning and designing air and space vehicles, as well as developing all related support and control systems.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: In our daily lives, we are increasingly understanding that emerging technological areas, such as the productive sector, the financial market, information security, computational biology, telecommunications, robotics, nanotechnologies or quantum computing, have a large mathematical component. Applied Mathematics and Computation models systems from different technological areas and develops mathematical solutions that help their study or optimization, putting them into practice with the help of computational tools.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: The MSc in Bioengineering and Nanosystems is an interdisciplinary programme, which encompasses elements of Engineering and Life Sciences, by exploring practical applications of engineering in research, development and industrial production in sectors such as Biotechnology, Information Science, Electronics and new materials. Graduates are equipped to design, build, test, analyze and apply cell lines, new molecules, nano and micro-devices, therapeutic and/or commercial interest systems in different industries, at both business and research levels.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Biological Engineering develops new solutions to technical and scientific problems at the intersection of biology and engineering. The role of a biological engineer involves studying, designing and developing new biotechnology-based products and services with applications in health, agri-food and the environment, which are fundamental to the well-being of a modern, fair and sustainable society.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Biomedical Engineering focuses on the development of new innovative technological solutions to solve problems in sectors such as healthcare, fundamental medicine and clinical medicine. A biomedical engineer is capable of: designing new equipment for medical imaging, biomedical devices; producing biomaterials; developing management health systems support tools; or even developing new applications by using cell and tissue engineering for diagnosis, follow-up and medical treatment.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Biotechnology is an emerging area that proposes technological and industrial applications for Biological Sciences, studying a range of subjects from cells and organisms characterization to the technological equipment necessary for their handling and use . Masters in Biotechnology have advanced training in multidisciplinary fields of Biological and Chemical Sciences and Technologies, allowing them to develop production processes and purification of bioproducts in the fermentation, pharmaceutical, agro-food, chemical and environmental industries.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Chemical Engineering develops new solutions for technical and scientific problems in the intersection of Chemistry and Engineering. The role of a chemical engineer is to investigate, design, conceive and operate systems for transforming chemical materials into final products, through chemical and physical processes, framed by economic, social, ethical and environmental constraints

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Civil Engineers play an increasingly important role in modern societies. They are responsible for designing, building, managing and maintaining the infrastructures that enable economic development. From design to operation, Civil Engineers combine technical and scientific knowledge with creativity to ensure the safety and sustainability of the built environment and its vital infrastructures, such as buildings, bridges, roads and other transportation and energy systems. Working in multidisciplinary teams and mixing innovation and responsibility, Civil Engineers shape the environment for a sustainable and resilient future.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Civil Engineers play an increasingly important role in modern societies. They are responsible for designing, building, managing and maintaining the infrastructures that enable economic development. From design to operation, Civil Engineers combine technical and scientific knowledge with creativity to ensure the safety and sustainability of the built environment and its vital infrastructures, such as buildings, bridges, roads and other transportation and energy systems. Working in multidisciplinary teams and mixing innovation and responsibility, Civil Engineers shape the environment for a sustainable and resilient future.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
field_of_study: Engenharias e técnicas afins - programas não classificados noutra área de formação
full_description_text: Data Science has become essential in several areas, from the financial and biomedical domains to cibersecurity, given its importance in the analysis and interpretation of high volumes of data. The interest of companies and organizations in various topics of Data Science and Engineering has been growing exponentially. Businesses recognize the enormous economic and commercial value of information, and its use as a differentiating element between competitors. Data Science thus supports strategic decisions, promotes knowledge expansion, and can even assist credit rating, self-driving vehicles, therapeutics design, content recommendation, mobility optimization, fraud detection, or stock exchange transactions.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Electrical and Computer Engineering is a constantly evolving field that has a significant impact on society — from electric vehicles to renewable energy, robotics, advanced communications and artificial intelligence. Electrical and computer engineers acquire a solid background in computer engineering, electronics, telecommunications, control systems, robotics, and energy. By developing these skills, they design technological solutions that bridge the gap between the physical and digital worlds, applying their knowledge in areas such as innovation, health, sustainability, transportation, entertainment, and industry, among others.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Electrical and Computer Engineering is a constantly evolving field that has a significant impact on society — from electric vehicles to renewable energy, robotics, advanced communications and artificial intelligence. Electrical and computer engineers acquire a solid background in computer engineering, electronics, telecommunications, control systems, robotics, and energy. By developing these skills, they design technological solutions that bridge the gap between the physical and digital worlds, applying their knowledge in areas such as innovation, health, sustainability, transportation, entertainment, and industry, among others.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Energy Resources Engineering studies new ways of prospecting, exploring and valuing energy mineral resources from a sustainable perspective. This Master provides knowledge, methods and tools to characterize and model the properties and processes that occur in the Earth’s subsurface, especially those related to geoenergy (geothermal, gas and oil) and geological carbon sequestration.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: For several decades now, it has become increasingly necessary to find solutions to a number of challenges related to the production, storage, transport and consumption of energy. The Master in Energy Engineering and Management addresses sustainable energy systems, in their different economic, environmental and social aspects.

program_name: Engineering and Management of Innovation and Entrepreneurship
university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
field_of_study: Engenharias e técnicas afins - programas não classificados noutra área de formação
full_description_text: Science and Technology have taken a decisive role in promoting business competitiveness and sustainable and socially responsible economic development. Following the motivation to value technology in these different areas, the Masters in Engineering and Management of Innovation and Entrepreneurship aims to train qualified professionals in innovation management, design thinking and development of new products and services, entrepreneurship, technology marketing, and technology policies and sectorial, contributing to the formulation and implementation of innovative business strategies and public policies.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Environmental Engineering is an interdisciplinary field of engineering dedicated to the prevention, mitigation, and resolution of environmental problems, developing solutions that promote a balance between human development and the sustainability of the Planet. The development of these solutions is often carried out in collaboration with other fields of knowledge, which together seek to contribute to more sustainable resource management.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Environmental Engineering is an interdisciplinary field of engineering dedicated to the prevention, mitigation, and resolution of environmental problems, developing solutions that promote a balance between human development and the sustainability of the Planet. The development of these solutions is often carried out in collaboration with other fields of knowledge, which together seek to contribute to more sustainable resource management.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: The Master’s Programme in Information and Enterprise Systems addresses the study of business technologies and systems, as well as the functioning of organisations, in order to seek solutions to the needs of constant technological innovation. The Técnico master’s students thus acquire skills that enable them to develop methodologies for exploration, application and evaluation of technologies adjusted to the study of intervention in scenarios of digital use, exploration and experimentation in an organisational context.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Access to information and protection of communications in a global and technological world are admittedly crucial for economic and social progress, and for the sovereignty of States. National and international institutions for the regulation, monitoring and implementation of strategies for Cyberspace have been created, as well as the development of critical infrastructures, where qualified professionals work in both the technical and academic and scientific fields, who sought to complement their training with this 2nd Study cycle.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Computers are everywhere! On your desk, as tablets or cell phones, embedded in pacemakers or insulin pumps, controlling lights or industrial systems, in cars or planes, in Tv sets or fridges. Computer Engineering applications range from organisation management to telecommunications, banks and insurance companies, healthcare, education, justice, defense, and also culture and entertainment. The role of a computing engineer involves the development, management and maintenance of software, while seeking to develop increasingly faster and more comprehensive solutions.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
field_of_study: Materiais (indústrias da madeira, cortiça, papel, plástico, vidro e outros)
full_description_text: Materials Engineering focuses on developing new materials (from their atomic structure to large-scale production), studying their behaviour and methods for enhancement and innovation, while addressing significant societal challenges. It studies materials from their composition and properties to production and recycling processes. A materials engineer acquires the skills to analyse, test, and select materials (ranging from polymers to metals and ceramics, including advanced materials like nanomaterials and biomaterials) for applications in sectors such as health, energy, the environment, mobility, and electronics. Materials engineers pay particular attention to the sustainability of materials, aiming to create solutions that minimise environmental impact, thereby supporting the energy transition and reducing reliance on fossil fuels.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Mechanical Engineering is fundamental in the manufacture of the different objects we use daily, as well as in the automation of the world around us. The role of a mechanical engineer is to analyze, design and design components, tools, machines and equipment, and also perform functions of organisation and management of production in an industry.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Microbiology studies microorganisms, namely their genome, cell function, diversity and evolution, essential to understanding the fundamental mechanisms of life. Técnico MSc in Microbiology studies the microbial community proposing applications for sectors such as industrial biotechnology, environmental recovery, energy production, human and animal health and in the food sector.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: The extractive industry ensures the sustainable exploration and management of raw materials, essential for the energy transition and transformation of our society towards a greener economy. Mining and Geological Engineering develops prospecting and mining techniques, promoting the digitization of the mining industry, based on the best practices of environmental sustainability, safety, smart mining, automation and robotics. The role of a Mining Engineer involves exploration, development and mining management, but also support for construction works, namely tunnels and other excavations in rock masses.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Molecular Science is a scientific area with a huge impact on the development of today’s society with the study and development of new compounds, materials or products that respond to societal, environmental and industrial challenges, whether in the pharmaceutical or fine-chemical, agro-food or polymers and nanomaterials. A Técnico MSc in Molecular Science and Engineering designs new molecules using advanced molecular modeling tools, synthesize and characterize them using qualitative and quantitative laboratory experimentation. In addition, they work on optimizing the synthesis process of these compounds and materials, assessing individual and environmental risks, innovating in terms of their sustainability.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
field_of_study: Construção e reparação de veículos a motor
full_description_text: Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering is fundamentally based on the design, construction and management of the operation of systems intended for the exploration of the sea, in its aspects of maritime transport, a source of living and mineral resources and also as a place for sport and leisure. As such, a naval engineer will be able to work in the design, construction, maintenance and management of all types of ships, vessels and floating structures.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Pharmaceutical Engineering is an emerging and interdisciplinary field dedicated to the innovation, production and quality of pharmaceutical products. It combines knowledge of biotechnology, manufacturing sciences and quality management, among other areas, to respond to new paradigms of formulation, personalized medicine, digitalization, and manufacturing efficiency. Holders of a Master in Pharmaceutical Engineering have a solid background in Pharmaceutical Technology and Pharmaceutical Process Engineering, being able to contribute significantly to technological innovation, to improving industrial competitiveness, and to leadership in the various areas of pharmaceutical manufacturing.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Engineering Physics brings about the vision that economic, human and social progress may be achieved by understanding and manipulating matter, not only at macroscopic scale, but also at scales from nanotechnology to the remote and unknown parts of the Universe. An engineering physicist is challenged daily to participate in scientific development in order to extend the limits of science, by acquiring and applying new knowledge in the frontier between science, engineering and technology.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Ionizing radiation has applications in various sectors such as Health, Industry, Environment, Research, Services, Security and Energy, in which aspects of Radiological Protection cannot be neglected. Radiation Protection and Safety Master Programme addresses a set of multidisciplinary topics, at the forefront of knowledge and transversal to several scientific and technological domains, in order to train professionals capable of meeting the needs of Education and Training involved in the use of ionizing radiation, either in companies, hospitals, research centers or regulatory bodies in the various industries mentioned.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: When thinking about the concept of a modern city, the importance of territorial management and urban studies is vital so that society itself can develop in the most optimal way possible. Territorial Management and Urban Studies professionals are able to actively intervene in a qualified and innovative way in the formulation of strategies and concrete solutions for the problems that arise in the planning, construction, rehabilitation and management of urban and metropolitan spaces.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico
full_description_text: Transportation Systems are a central component of a country’s economy, as they enable the mobility of people and goods, enabling travel and transactions that sustain all economic and social activity. A master student in Transportation Systems will study and design transport networks, introducing intelligent systems, creating and managing services and acting in the management, construction and maintenance of infrastructure. Aiming at the efficient performance of these systems and technological innovation, professionals in this area are concerned with the entire life cycle of a transportation system, from environmental impacts to aspects such as pricing, support, search for potential users and policy definition.

program_name: Bioengineering for Regenerative and Precision Medicine
university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico (Tagus Park)
full_description_text: Regenerative Medicine deals with the process of restoring, repairing and improving normal functions of damaged tissues and organs, and engineering new tissues and organs to extend and improve quality of life. In Precision Medicine, diagnostic testing and prevention strategies of diseases are applied to clinics, considering genetic and environmental variability, among other factors.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico (Tagus Park)
full_description_text: Electronics Engineering focuses on the study and implementation of electronic circuits and systems that are part of our daily lives, i.e., it designs and develops systems that are integrated into all the equipment we use every day and are the basis and support for current technological advances. The role of the electronic engineer is to design, implement and test electronic systems with applications in various areas, such as communication networks, embedded systems, satellites and space missions, autonomous robots, biomedical and health support systems, and processing systems for Artificial Intelligence.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico (Tagus Park)
field_of_study: Engenharias e técnicas afins - programas não classificados noutra área de formação
full_description_text: Industrial Engineering and Management brings together engineering sciences and business administration in order to solve problems in companies and industries. The role of industrial engineers involves planning, optimizing and managing activities such as industrial output (its processes and operations), logistics and distribution; they can also work in areas like finance, marketing, information systems, strategy and organisation of a company or take up consultancy as a career.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico (Tagus Park)
full_description_text: Computers are everywhere! On your desk, as tablets or cell phones, embedded in pacemakers or insulin pumps, controlling lights or industrial systems, in cars or planes, in Tv sets or fridges. Computer Engineering applications range from organisation management to telecommunications, banks and insurance companies, healthcare, education, justice, defense, and also culture and entertainment. The role of a computing engineer involves the development, management and maintenance of software, while seeking to develop increasingly faster and more comprehensive solutions.

university_name: Universidade de Lisboa - Instituto Superior Técnico (Tagus Park)
full_description_text: Telecommunications and Informatics Engineering is the Engineering of the Internet, connecting us to the world through 5G and Wi-Fi, the Internet of Things, and data centers, while safeguarding our networks against cybersecurity threats. A telecommunications and informatics engineer designs and manages the networks that form the global Internet, develops digital applications and services, including those we use daily on our smartphones, and integrates artificial intelligence to create autonomous networks, intelligent services, and digital infrastructures capable of learning, adapting, and continuously evolving.
